title: main.rs: unknown MERCHANT_NETWORK silently disables payments with misleading log
description: main.rs load_merchant_wallet() line 234-240: unrecognized MERCHANT_NETWORK returns None, relay starts without merchant wallet. Log message says 'MERCHANT_DFVK not set' (misleading — DFVK is set, network is bad). Other env-var mistakes are fatal (KEEPALIVE_SECS=0, SUBSCRIPTION_PRICE_ZATOSHI=0 call anyhow::bail\!). A typo in MERCHANT_NETWORK silently disables all subscription payments. Fix: anyhow::bail\! on unknown MERCHANT_NETWORK, consistent with other fatal env-var checks.
